body_preview: Make `yyds state why last-failure` suggest concrete alternative diagnostic commands when no failure event exists, instead of leaving the user at a dead end. The existing `build_why_report` already distinguishes "no sessions completed" from "all green" from "few failures" — this task adds alternative next-step suggestions and a branch for active/incomplete ru
expected_evidence: Future assessments can cite concrete diagnostic suggestions instead of "no state event found for last-failure." State/dashboard operator workflows have clear escalation paths. Implementation Notes: The change is in `build_why_report` (line ~2571 in commands_state.rs). When `find_target_event` returns None, the error message already has three branches (no ses
title: Improve cold-start `state why last-failure` with alternative diagnostic paths
